strengths: Successfully completed all major task phases including needle passes and extracorporeal knot tying
Demonstrated good time management with completion in 155 seconds
Maintained instrument control throughout the suturing sequence
weaknesses: Failed to achieve complete slit closure, leaving a visible gap in the Penrose drain
Insufficient knot tightening or improper tension management during final closure
May have rushed the final closure assessment phase

drills.name: Slit-closure check drill
drills.description: Tighten just enough to close the slit without avulsion, then visually inspect for complete closure before cutting
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to achieve complete slit closure

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Practice 10 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate pusher advancement and controlled tension
drills.targets_weakness: Insufficient knot tightening or improper tension management

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent completion into precision closure. The technical execution is solid, but attention to final closure verification will eliminate penalty deductions.
